rationale: Diff contains only execution evidence files (manifest.json, result.json) for an attempt. No actual implementation of ADR-004 (collection abstraction, archive, attachments, migration tool) is present. AC items 2-5 are unimplemented.

findings.summary: No code changes implementing collection abstraction, archive read-through, attachment sidecar, archive command, or migration tool. Only execution metadata files were committed.
AC1 (all child beads closed) cannot be verified from diff; child beads ddx-2f453147, ddx-f7f09b6e, ddx-cd1f0f7e, ddx-8fcfe2a7, ddx-cb2eb7e3, ddx-9f7a04f4 show no implementation here.
AC5 (migration tool runs cleanly on 5.4MB beads.jsonl) — no migrate-archive command added to CLI.
